items.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
items.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，反映头部玩家最新动作。

items.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
items.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
items.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，反映头部玩家最新动作。

items.title: Lawsuit claims Meta's layoff decisions were made by AI, not humans
items.summary: Meta denies using AI to terminate workers with disabilities and medical problems.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: US military sent explosive drone boats into combat for the first time
items.summary: US military’s drone boats struck an Iranian naval port as war heats up again.
